focus: [D4-A13/D4] HTTP/fourth-surface escape - only daemon-side Open Design run/build precondition covers CLI, MCP, HTTP, and Skills

graphEvents.label: Where must the Open Design design-proof precondition live so it covers CLI, MCP, HTTP, and in-app Skills?
Open Design documents four interchangeable daemon-backed surfaces, so MCP-only or Bash-only enforcement is incomplete
The current sk-design precondition is strong in skill docs, pseudocode, and manual playbooks, but not an executable shared daemon invariant
The design proof token must be normalized as structured daemon input or metadata before start_run/build, not hidden in prompt prose
A daemon gate must classify operation purpose so pure transport stays exempt while design grounding/generation/form answers require proof
Every Open Design surface that can start or fire design generation must pass through one daemon-side DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1 validator before the inner agent or build begins
CLI, MCP, HTTP, Skills, and automation requests should normalize into one envelope carrying surface, operation, project/conversation, compiled payload digests, and designProofToken
Pure wiring and bare inventory are exempt by operation purpose, not by surface name; later design use requires tokenized grounding or re-read

label: Open Design documents four interchangeable daemon-backed surfaces, so MCP-only or Bash-only enforcement is incomplete
buildableRecommendation: Add daemon-side DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1 validation at the normalized run/build boundary before inner-agent spawn or build fire; keep client hooks as defense-in-depth.

label: The current sk-design precondition is strong in skill docs, pseudocode, and manual playbooks, but not an executable shared daemon invariant
buildableRecommendation: Convert the manual GATE-001 contract into daemon policy plus four-surface replay fixtures.

label: The design proof token must be normalized as structured daemon input or metadata before start_run/build, not hidden in prompt prose
buildableRecommendation: Define a daemon request envelope with surface, operation, project/conversation, compiled payload digests, and designProofToken; validate digests before forwarding.

label: A daemon gate must classify operation purpose so pure transport stays exempt while design grounding/generation/form answers require proof
buildableRecommendation: Use operationClass/openDesignUse fixtures to allow transport_inventory and deny design_grounding/design_generation without a valid token.

label: Every Open Design surface that can start or fire design generation must pass through one daemon-side DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1 validator before the inner agent or build begins
CLI, MCP, HTTP, Skills, and automation requests should normalize into one envelope carrying surface, operation, project/conversation, compiled payload digests, and designProofToken
Pure wiring and bare inventory are exempt by operation purpose, not by surface name; later design use requires tokenized grounding or re-read

direction: MCP-only or Bash-only Open Design proof enforcement
reason: Local docs confirm CLI, MCP, HTTP API, and in-app Skills are interchangeable daemon-backed surfaces, so caller-side hooks cannot cover every path.
